Notes.Text:
This update for ncurses fixes the following issue:

- CVE-2025-69720: buffer overflow in function `analyze_string()`of `progs/infocmp.c` (bsc#1259924).
Notes.Title: Details

Vulnerabilities.Description: The infocmp command-line tool in ncurses before 6.5-20251213 has a stack-based buffer overflow in analyze_string in progs/infocmp.c.
